content: I'll decompose this scenario into a single implementation task for the /goodbye endpoint.

function.name: decompose_task
function.arguments: {"goal":"Implement /goodbye endpoint for hello world project","nodes":[{"id":"implement-goodbye","prompt":"Add a /goodbye endpoint to api/app.py that returns JSON {\"message\": \"Goodbye, World!\"}. Include tests in api/test_goodbye.py.","role":"developer","depends_on":[],"file_scope":["api/app.py","api/test_goodbye.py"]}]}
